metadata.onet_source: O*NET Online (US Department of Labor) - Computer & Mathematical Occupations (SOC 15-XXXX) + Computer Hardware Engineering (17-2061.00)
metadata.note: Comprehensive IT & Tech job dataset for India. Salary ranges in INR. Roles sourced from O*NET, industry salary guides, job boards (Indeed, LinkedIn), and 2025-2026 tech hiring trend reports. Includes traditional IT, emerging AI/ML, cloud-native, cybersecurity, ERP, and specialized tech roles.
sources: O*NET Online (US DOL) - SOC 15-XXXX Computer & Mathematical + 17-2061.00
Lorien UK Technology & Digital Salary Survey 2025
redShift Recruiting IT Job Titles Library (400+ titles)

jobs.title: Junior Software Developer
jobs.description: Entry-level developer who writes, tests, and debugs code under the guidance of senior engineers. Works on specific modules or features within a larger software system.
roles_responsibilities: Write clean, maintainable code for assigned features and modules
Fix bugs and resolve issues reported from QA or production
Participate in code reviews and incorporate feedback
Write unit tests and basic documentation
Collaborate with senior developers and learn engineering best practices
jobs.future_scope: Strong foundation for Software Developer, Full Stack, or specialized engineering tracks.

jobs.title: Software Developer
jobs.description: Research, design, and develop computer software or specialized utility programs. Analyzes user needs and develops software solutions applying principles of computer science.
roles_responsibilities: Design, code, and test software applications end-to-end
Analyze requirements and translate into technical specifications
Collaborate with product managers, designers, and QA teams
Optimize performance and scalability of software systems
Participate in agile ceremonies and contribute to sprint planning
jobs.future_scope: Core engineering role with paths to Senior Developer, Tech Lead, Architect, or Engineering Manager.

jobs.title: Senior Software Developer
jobs.description: An experienced engineer who designs complex software systems, leads technical decision-making, and mentors junior developers while delivering high-quality software at scale.
roles_responsibilities: Design and architect complex software components and systems
Lead technical discussions and code reviews
Mentor junior and mid-level engineers
Define engineering standards and best practices
Estimate effort and plan deliverables for major features

alternative: 6+ Years Engineering Experience with Strong Portfolio

jobs.future_scope: Path to Staff Engineer, Principal Engineer, Engineering Manager, or Architect.

jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer
jobs.description: A senior-plus engineering role that drives cross-team technical strategy, solves the organization's hardest engineering problems, and sets the engineering bar.
roles_responsibilities: Define technical direction across multiple teams
Lead large-scale architectural initiatives
Solve complex, ambiguous, and high-impact engineering problems
Evaluate new technologies and make adoption recommendations
Influence engineering culture and hiring standards
jobs.future_scope: Path to Principal Engineer, Distinguished Engineer, or VP Engineering.

jobs.title: Principal / Distinguished Engineer
jobs.description: The most senior individual contributor engineering role. Defines the multi-year technical vision for the company, solves strategic engineering challenges, and is recognized as an internal and external thought leader.
roles_responsibilities: Set multi-year engineering and architecture vision
Lead company-wide technical transformation initiatives
Represent the company at external technical forums and conferences
Partner with C-suite on technology investment decisions
Define engineering culture, principles, and hiring bar
jobs.future_scope: Top of the IC engineering ladder. Paths to CTO, Founding Engineer at startup, or Research Leader.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Develops and implements the visual and interactive elements of websites and web applications, translating UI/UX designs into responsive, performant browser-based experiences.
roles_responsibilities: Build responsive, accessible UI components using modern frameworks
Translate Figma/XD designs into pixel-perfect implementations
Optimize frontend performance and page load speeds
Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility
Integrate frontend with backend APIs and services
jobs.future_scope: Path to Senior Frontend, Full Stack Developer, or Frontend Architect.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Designs and builds the server-side logic, APIs, databases, and infrastructure that power applications. Focuses on performance, scalability, and data integrity.
roles_responsibilities: Design and develop RESTful and GraphQL APIs
Build scalable server-side application logic and services
Design and manage relational and NoSQL databases
Implement authentication, authorization, and security controls
Optimize query performance and backend throughput
jobs.future_scope: Path to Senior Backend, Full Stack, Distributed Systems Engineer, or Backend Architect.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Develops both frontend and backend components of web applications, capable of building complete, production-ready features across the entire technology stack.
roles_responsibilities: Develop end-to-end features across frontend and backend
Design database schemas and manage data pipelines
Build and consume REST/GraphQL APIs
Deploy and maintain applications on cloud infrastructure
Collaborate with product and design teams on full feature delivery
jobs.future_scope: Highly versatile role. Path to Tech Lead, Senior Full Stack, or startup CTO.

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer (Android / iOS)
jobs.description: Designs and builds mobile applications for Android, iOS, or cross-platform environments. Focuses on performance, user experience, and device API integration.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and maintain Android / iOS / cross-platform mobile apps
Integrate mobile apps with backend APIs and third-party services
Optimize app performance, memory usage, and battery efficiency
Publish and manage apps on Google Play and Apple App Store
Implement push notifications, analytics, and crash reporting

alternative: Published App on Store + Mobile Portfolio

jobs.future_scope: Huge demand in India's mobile-first market. Path to Senior Mobile Dev or Mobile Architect.

jobs.title: Embedded Systems / Firmware Engineer
jobs.description: Develops low-level software that runs directly on hardware devices like microcontrollers, IoT devices, automotive systems, and consumer electronics.
roles_responsibilities: Write firmware and embedded software in C/C++ for microcontrollers
Interface with hardware peripherals via I2C, SPI, UART, CAN protocols
Optimize code for constrained memory and power environments
Debug hardware-software integration issues using oscilloscopes and JTAG
Collaborate with hardware engineers on product design
jobs.future_scope: Critical in automotive, IoT, defense, and consumer electronics. Path to Embedded Architect or R&D Lead.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Collects, processes, and analyzes data to generate insights that support business decisions. Builds dashboards, reports, and ad hoc analyses for stakeholders.
roles_responsibilities: Collect, clean, and transform data from multiple sources
Build dashboards and recurring reports for business teams
Conduct ad hoc analyses to answer business questions
Identify trends, anomalies, and growth opportunities in data
Work with SQL, Excel, and BI tools to present insights clearly
jobs.future_scope: High demand across all industries. Clear path to Senior Analyst, Data Scientist, or Product Analyst.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Develops and implements a set of techniques and analytics applications to transform raw data into meaningful information using data-oriented programming languages and visualization software.
roles_responsibilities: Build predictive and statistical models using ML techniques
Collect, clean, and engineer features from large datasets
Design and analyze A/B experiments
Communicate findings and recommendations to business stakeholders
Collaborate with engineers to deploy models to production

educational_qualification.minimum: Bachelor's Degree in a quantitative field
alternative: Kaggle Competitions + Strong Portfolio + Relevant Certifications

jobs.future_scope: One of the most in-demand roles globally. Path to Senior Data Scientist, ML Engineer, or Head of Data.

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
jobs.description: Leads complex data science projects, mentors junior data scientists, and drives the integration of ML into core product and business processes.
roles_responsibilities: Lead end-to-end data science projects from problem definition to deployment
Mentor junior data scientists and analysts
Define the team's modeling standards and best practices
Collaborate with engineering, product, and business leadership
Drive business impact through ML experimentation and deployment

educational_qualification.minimum: M.Sc / M.Tech in a quantitative field
alternative: 5+ Years Data Science with Demonstrated Business Impact

jobs.future_scope: Path to Lead Data Scientist, Head of Data Science, or Chief Data Officer.

jobs.title: Business Intelligence (BI) Analyst
jobs.description: Produces financial and market intelligence by querying data repositories and generating reports. Designs dashboards and devises methods for identifying data patterns and trends.
roles_responsibilities: Build and maintain BI dashboards and reports
Query data warehouses using SQL to answer business questions
Define KPIs and metrics frameworks for business teams
Collaborate with data engineers on data modeling
Present insights to leadership and stakeholders
jobs.future_scope: BI is growing across all sectors. Path to BI Manager, Data Engineer, or Data Architect.

jobs.title: Statistician / Quantitative Analyst
jobs.description: Develops or applies mathematical or statistical theory and methods to collect, organize, interpret, and summarize numerical data to provide usable information.
roles_responsibilities: Design experiments and statistical sampling frameworks
Analyze survey, operational, or experimental data
Apply regression, hypothesis testing, and Bayesian methods
Interpret and communicate statistical findings to non-technical audiences
Build statistical models for forecasting and decision support

alternative: Strong Quantitative Background + Data Science Certifications

jobs.future_scope: High demand in BFSI, pharma, government, and research. Path to Senior Statistician or Data Science Lead.

jobs.title: Actuary
jobs.description: Analyzes statistical data such as mortality, accident, sickness, disability, and retirement rates. Constructs probability tables to forecast risk and liability for insurance and financial planning.
roles_responsibilities: Analyze financial risk using statistical and mathematical models
Design and price insurance products and pension schemes
Prepare reports on financial projections and risk exposure
Ensure regulatory compliance with IRDAI / PFRDA guidelines
Advise management on risk management strategies

preferred: Fellow of Institute of Actuaries of India (FIAI)
alternative: Cleared Actuarial Exams (CT series) + Industry Experience

jobs.future_scope: Highly regulated and specialized. Path to Chief Actuary or Chief Risk Officer in insurance and BFSI.

jobs.title: Operations Research Analyst
jobs.description: Formulates and applies mathematical modeling and other optimizing methods to develop and interpret information that assists management with decision-making, policy formulation, and other managerial functions.
roles_responsibilities: Build optimization models for logistics, supply chain, and resource allocation
Apply linear programming, simulation, and heuristics to business problems
Analyze operational data to identify efficiency opportunities
Present findings and recommendations to management
Collaborate with engineering and business teams on model deployment

educational_qualification.minimum: M.Sc / M.Tech in Operations Research / Industrial Engineering

jobs.future_scope: High demand in logistics, e-commerce, BFSI, and consulting. Path to Head of Analytics or OR Lead.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Designs, builds, and deploys machine learning systems and models at scale. Bridges the gap between data science research and production-grade software engineering.
roles_responsibilities: Build and productionize ML pipelines and models
Design feature engineering and data preprocessing workflows
Optimize model performance, latency, and throughput
Collaborate with data scientists to take models from research to production
Implement model monitoring, A/B testing, and retraining workflows

alternative: Strong ML Portfolio + Deployed Production Models

jobs.future_scope: One of the hottest roles globally. Path to Senior MLE, AI Research Engineer, or Head of ML.

jobs.title: AI Research Scientist
jobs.description: Conducts original research into fundamental and applied AI/ML. Develops new algorithms, architectures, and methodologies that push the state of the art.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct original research in deep learning, NLP, CV, RL, or related areas
Publish papers at top venues (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, ACL, CVPR)
Develop novel model architectures and training techniques
Collaborate with product teams to transfer research into applications
Mentor junior researchers and engineers

preferred: PhD in CS / Statistics / AI / ML
alternative: Top-tier Research Publications without a PhD

jobs.future_scope: Fastest growing research field in tech. Path to Principal Researcher, Research Director, or CTO.

jobs.title: Natural Language Processing (NLP) Engineer
jobs.description: Builds systems that enable computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language. Works on LLMs, text classification, chatbots, search, summarization, and translation.
roles_responsibilities: Build and fine-tune NLP models for text classification, NER, summarization, and QA
Work with large language models (LLMs) and prompt engineering
Develop data pipelines for text preprocessing and annotation
Evaluate model performance on NLP benchmarks
Deploy NLP services as production APIs

alternative: Strong NLP Projects + Hugging Face Contributions

jobs.future_scope: Explosive demand due to LLM revolution. Path to AI Lead, NLP Architect, or Head of AI.

jobs.title: Computer Vision Engineer
jobs.description: Builds systems that enable machines to interpret and process visual data including images and video. Applies deep learning for object detection, segmentation, recognition, and generation.
roles_responsibilities: Build and train deep learning models for image and video analysis
Implement object detection, segmentation, and recognition pipelines
Annotate and manage image/video datasets
Optimize CV models for edge devices and real-time inference
Deploy computer vision APIs and integrate with hardware systems

alternative: Strong CV Portfolio + Open Source Contributions

jobs.future_scope: High demand in surveillance, healthcare, automotive, and manufacturing. Path to AI Lead or CV Architect.

jobs.title: MLOps Engineer
jobs.description: Builds and maintains the infrastructure, platforms, and pipelines that enable ML models to be reliably developed, tested, deployed, and monitored in production.
roles_responsibilities: Build and maintain ML pipelines and model training infrastructure
Implement CI/CD for ML models and feature stores
Monitor model performance and data drift in production
Manage model versioning, registries, and experiment tracking
Collaborate with data scientists and ML engineers on deployment

preferred: B.Tech CSE with ML and DevOps knowledge

jobs.future_scope: Emerging critical role as ML scales. Path to ML Platform Engineer or Head of AI Infrastructure.

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.description: Designs, builds, and maintains data pipelines and infrastructure that enable data scientists and analysts to access, process, and analyze large-scale datasets.
roles_responsibilities: Build and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines from multiple data sources
Design and manage data warehouses, lakes, and lakehouses
Ensure data quality, reliability, and availability
Optimize pipeline performance and cost at scale
Collaborate with data scientists and BI teams on data modeling

preferred: M.Tech / MCA with Data Engineering experience

jobs.future_scope: Data Engineering is foundational to the data economy. Path to Senior DE, Data Architect, or Platform Lead.

jobs.title: Database Administrator (DBA)
jobs.description: Administers, tests, and implements computer databases. Manages database design, maintenance, performance tuning, backup, and recovery.
roles_responsibilities: Install, configure, and maintain database management systems (DBMS)
Monitor database performance and optimize queries and indexes
Manage database security, access control, and user privileges
Plan and execute backup, recovery, and disaster recovery procedures
Coordinate schema changes and database migrations
jobs.future_scope: Stable demand across all sectors. Path to Senior DBA, Database Architect, or Data Platform Engineer.

jobs.title: Database Architect
jobs.description: Designs strategies for enterprise databases, data warehouse systems, and multidimensional networks. Sets standards for database operations, programming, and documentation.
roles_responsibilities: Design enterprise-grade database architectures and data models
Define data governance and database standards
Evaluate and select database technologies for new projects
Lead database migrations and platform modernization
Collaborate with data engineers and architects on platform design

alternative: 8+ Years DBA / DE Experience with Architecture Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Path to Chief Data Architect or VP Data Engineering.

jobs.title: Data Warehousing Specialist
jobs.description: Designs, models, and implements corporate data warehousing activities. Programs and configures warehouses of database information to support analytics and reporting.
roles_responsibilities: Design dimensional data models (star/snowflake schemas)
Build and maintain ETL pipelines feeding the data warehouse
Optimize warehouse performance and query costs
Implement data quality checks and SLAs
Support BI and analytics teams with data access
jobs.future_scope: Core of the modern data stack. Path to Data Architect or Head of Data Platform.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Bridges software development and IT operations by building CI/CD pipelines, automating infrastructure, and ensuring reliable and fast software delivery.
roles_responsibilities: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments
Provision and manage cloud infrastructure using IaC tools
Monitor application performance and respond to incidents
Implement container orchestration with Docker and Kubernetes
Collaborate with developers on build, test, and release processes

alternative: Self-taught with Hands-on Labs + Cloud Certifications

jobs.future_scope: Essential in all cloud-first organizations. Path to Senior DevOps, Platform Engineer, or SRE.

jobs.title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
jobs.description: Applies software engineering principles to IT operations challenges. Owns reliability, availability, and performance of large-scale distributed production systems.
roles_responsibilities: Define and manage SLOs, SLAs, and error budgets
Build automation to eliminate toil and manual operational work
Manage incident response and post-mortem processes
Design and improve observability (logging, tracing, metrics)
Optimize system reliability and capacity planning

preferred: B.Tech CSE with strong systems background

jobs.future_scope: Critical in large tech companies. Path to Staff SRE or Head of Platform Engineering.

jobs.title: Cloud Architect
jobs.description: Designs and implements computer and information networks and cloud infrastructure strategies, ensuring scalability, security, and cost-effectiveness of cloud environments.
roles_responsibilities: Design scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud architectures
Evaluate cloud services and define cloud adoption strategy
Lead cloud migration and modernization projects
Define cloud governance, security, and compliance frameworks
Mentor DevOps and cloud engineers on best practices

alternative: 8+ Years in Cloud/Infrastructure with Architecture Experience

jobs.future_scope: Every enterprise is moving to cloud. Path to Principal Cloud Architect or CTO.

jobs.title: Platform Engineer
jobs.description: Builds and maintains internal developer platforms (IDP) — the shared infrastructure, tooling, and self-service capabilities that enable engineering teams to ship faster and more reliably.
roles_responsibilities: Build and maintain internal developer platforms and tooling
Standardize CI/CD, observability, and deployment workflows
Create self-service capabilities for developer teams
Own reliability and scalability of shared platform services
Reduce cognitive load on product engineering teams

preferred: B.Tech CSE with DevOps / SRE experience

jobs.future_scope: One of the fastest-growing engineering niches. Path to Staff Platform Engineer or VP Engineering.

jobs.title: Information Security Analyst
jobs.description: Plans, implements, upgrades, or monitors security measures for the protection of computer networks and information. Assesses system vulnerabilities for security risks and proposes and implements risk mitigation strategies.
roles_responsibilities: Monitor security systems, SIEM tools, and network traffic
Investigate and respond to security incidents and alerts
Conduct vulnerability assessments and risk analysis
Implement and maintain security policies and controls
Prepare security reports and compliance documentation
jobs.future_scope: Cybersecurity is among the fastest growing fields. Path to Senior Analyst, SOC Lead, or CISO.

jobs.title: Penetration Tester (Ethical Hacker)
jobs.description: Evaluates network and system security by conducting simulated internal and external cyberattacks using adversary tools and techniques. Attempts to breach and assess security measures.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct authorized penetration tests on web apps, networks, and systems
Use OWASP Top 10 and attack frameworks (MITRE ATT&CK) to simulate threats
Document vulnerabilities and prepare detailed pentest reports
Collaborate with development and security teams on remediation
Perform social engineering and phishing simulations

alternative: CTF Competitions + Hack The Box Profile + OSCP

jobs.future_scope: High demand from BFSI, government, and IT companies. Path to Red Team Lead or Security Architect.

jobs.title: Information Security Engineer
jobs.description: Develops and oversees the implementation of information security procedures and policies. Builds, maintains, and upgrades security technology such as firewalls, encryption, and SIEM systems.
roles_responsibilities: Design and implement security architecture and controls
Manage identity and access management (IAM) systems
Integrate security into DevSecOps pipelines
Perform threat modeling and security code reviews
Respond to and manage security incidents
jobs.future_scope: Path to Security Architect, CISO, or Head of InfoSec.

jobs.title: Digital Forensics Analyst
jobs.description: Conducts investigations on computer-based crimes, establishing documentary or physical evidence such as digital media and logs associated with cyber incidents.
roles_responsibilities: Investigate cyber incidents, data breaches, and digital crimes
Collect, preserve, and analyze digital evidence
Perform memory forensics and malware analysis
Produce forensic investigation reports for legal proceedings
Collaborate with law enforcement and legal teams
jobs.future_scope: Growing demand from government, BFSI, and law enforcement. Path to DFIR Lead or Head of Cyber Intelligence.

jobs.title: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
jobs.description: The senior executive responsible for an organization's information security strategy, program, and team. Reports to the CEO and board on cyber risk posture and compliance.
roles_responsibilities: Define and own enterprise information security strategy
Manage security teams across SOC, AppSec, GRC, and Threat Intel
Report cyber risk to board and executive leadership
Oversee compliance with CERT-In, ISO 27001, DPDP Act, and PCI-DSS
Lead incident response for major security breaches

alternative: 15+ Years in Security with Director-Level Experience

jobs.future_scope: Top of the cybersecurity career ladder. CISO is now a board-level role in large enterprises.

jobs.title: Network Support Specialist
jobs.description: Analyzes, tests, troubleshoots, and evaluates existing network systems such as LANs, WANs, and cloud networks. Performs network maintenance to ensure networks operate correctly.
roles_responsibilities: Diagnose and resolve network connectivity issues
Monitor network performance and capacity
Maintain network equipment and configurations
Provide technical support to end users on network issues
Document network incidents and resolutions
jobs.future_scope: Foundation for Network Engineer or Systems Administrator track.

jobs.title: Network & Systems Administrator
jobs.description: Installs, configures, and maintains an organization's LAN, WAN, and other data communications networks, operating systems, and computer hardware.
roles_responsibilities: Manage servers, network equipment, and OS environments
Administer Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and group policies
Monitor system health, performance, and capacity
Implement backup, patching, and disaster recovery procedures
Provide escalated support for infrastructure issues
jobs.future_scope: Path to Senior Systems Admin, Infrastructure Lead, or Cloud Engineer.

jobs.title: Network Architect
jobs.description: Designs and implements computer and information networks, including LAN, WAN, cloud networks, and intranets. Creates plans and layouts for data communication networks.
roles_responsibilities: Design enterprise network architectures (LAN/WAN/SD-WAN/Cloud)
Evaluate and recommend network hardware and technology
Define network standards, security, and documentation
Lead network modernization and cloud connectivity projects
Troubleshoot complex network performance and design issues
jobs.future_scope: Path to Principal Network Architect or VP Infrastructure.

jobs.title: Telecommunications Engineering Specialist
jobs.description: Designs or configures wired, wireless, and satellite communications systems for voice, video, and data services. Supervises installation and maintenance of telecom systems.
roles_responsibilities: Design and configure telecom systems (4G/5G, VoIP, MPLS, fiber)
Manage installation and commissioning of telecom equipment
Monitor telecom network performance and resolve outages
Conduct capacity planning for voice and data services
Coordinate with telecom vendors and service providers
jobs.future_scope: 5G rollout in India creates massive demand. Path to Telecom Architect or Network Planning Manager.

jobs.title: QA / Software Test Engineer
jobs.description: Develops and executes software tests to identify software problems and their causes. Documents and tracks software defects and verifies fixes before production release.
roles_responsibilities: Design and execute manual and automated test cases
Identify, document, and track bugs through the defect lifecycle
Develop and maintain test plans and test scripts
Perform functional, regression, performance, and UAT testing
Collaborate with developers on root cause analysis and fixes
jobs.future_scope: Path to Automation Engineer, QA Lead, or SDET (Software Development Engineer in Test).

jobs.title: Automation Test Engineer (SDET)
jobs.description: Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) who builds automated testing frameworks and infrastructure that enable continuous, scalable software quality validation.
roles_responsibilities: Design and build test automation frameworks from scratch
Write automated test scripts for UI, API, and performance testing
Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines
Maintain and scale the test automation infrastructure
Mentor manual QA engineers on automation best practices
jobs.future_scope: High demand as automation adoption grows. Path to QA Architect, Engineering Manager, or SDE.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Designs digital user interfaces and web/mobile experiences. Develops and tests layouts, interfaces, functionality, and navigation to ensure usability, compatibility, and quality.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct user research, interviews, and usability testing
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI mockups
Design and maintain design systems and component libraries
Collaborate with product managers and developers on feature design
Iterate based on user feedback and data insights

alternative: Strong Design Portfolio + UX Certifications (Google UX, NNG)

jobs.future_scope: High demand in product companies. Path to Senior Designer, Design Lead, or Head of Design.

jobs.title: Video Game Designer
jobs.description: Designs core features of video games. Specifies innovative game mechanics, story lines, and character biographies. Creates and maintains design documentation for game development teams.
roles_responsibilities: Design game mechanics, systems, and player progression
Write game design documents (GDD) and feature specifications
Collaborate with artists, engineers, and producers on game development
Prototype and playtest game features to validate design decisions
Balance game economy, difficulty, and player engagement

preferred: B.Tech CSE with Game Dev specialization
alternative: Strong Game Portfolio + Published Indie Games

jobs.future_scope: India's gaming industry is booming. Path to Lead Game Designer or Game Director.

jobs.title: Computer Systems Analyst
jobs.description: Analyzes science, engineering, business, and other data processing problems to develop and implement solutions to complex applications problems, system administration issues, or network concerns.
roles_responsibilities: Analyze existing IT systems and identify areas for improvement
Gather user requirements and translate into technical specifications
Evaluate commercial software packages and recommend solutions
Coordinate system implementation and user training
Ensure systems align with business needs and IT strategy

alternative: 4-6 Years IT Experience + Systems Analysis Certifications

jobs.future_scope: Path to IT Consultant, Enterprise Architect, or Business Analyst.

jobs.title: Software / Systems Architect
jobs.description: Designs and develops solutions to complex applications problems, system administration issues, or network concerns. Performs systems management and integration functions and creates systems models.
roles_responsibilities: Define high-level system architecture and technology stack
Create architecture diagrams, ADRs, and technical documentation
Ensure non-functional requirements (scalability, reliability, security) are met
Lead technical design reviews and architecture governance
Guide engineering teams on architectural decisions and best practices
jobs.future_scope: Path to Principal Architect, CTO, or Distinguished Engineer.

jobs.title: IT Project Manager
jobs.description: Plans, initiates, and manages information technology projects. Leads and guides the work of technical staff. Serves as liaison between business and technical aspects of projects.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and manage IT project scope, schedule, budget, and resources
Coordinate between technical teams, business stakeholders, and vendors
Track and report on project milestones, risks, and issues
Manage change requests and ensure scope control
Lead sprint ceremonies in Agile environments
jobs.future_scope: IT PMs are in demand across all industries. Path to Program Manager or PMO Director.

jobs.title: IT Support Specialist / Help Desk Technician
jobs.description: Provides technical assistance to computer users. Answers questions and resolves computer problems for clients in person, via telephone, or electronically.
roles_responsibilities: Provide L1/L2 technical support to end users via phone, email, and chat
Troubleshoot hardware, software, OS, and network issues
Manage and resolve tickets using ITSM tools within SLA
Install, configure, and maintain desktops, laptops, and peripherals
Escalate complex issues to L3 and infrastructure teams

alternative: 2-4 Years IT Support Experience + CompTIA A+

jobs.future_scope: Entry point into IT careers. Path to L2 Support, Systems Admin, or IT Manager.

jobs.title: Web Administrator
jobs.description: Manages web environment design, deployment, development, and maintenance activities. Performs testing and quality assurance of web sites and web applications.
roles_responsibilities: Manage web server configuration, performance, and availability
Deploy and maintain web applications and CMS platforms
Monitor web traffic, uptime, and performance metrics
Manage SSL certificates, DNS, and domain records
Implement web security policies and access controls
jobs.future_scope: Path to DevOps Engineer, Cloud Engineer, or Full Stack Developer.

jobs.title: Computer Hardware Engineer
jobs.description: Researches, designs, develops, or tests computer or computer-related equipment for commercial, industrial, military, or scientific use. May supervise the manufacturing and installation of computer hardware.
roles_responsibilities: Design and develop computer hardware components and systems
Create schematics and PCB layouts for electronic assemblies
Test and validate hardware prototypes and production units
Debug hardware failures and perform root cause analysis
Collaborate with embedded software engineers on firmware integration
jobs.future_scope: High demand in semiconductor, IoT, and defense industries. Path to Hardware Architect or R&D Lead.

jobs.title: Blockchain Engineer
jobs.description: Maintains and supports distributed and decentralized blockchain-based networks or blockchain applications such as cryptocurrency exchange, payment processing, and smart contract platforms.
roles_responsibilities: Design and develop smart contracts and DApps (Decentralized Applications)
Build and integrate blockchain protocols and consensus mechanisms
Ensure security and auditability of smart contracts
Develop APIs and SDKs for blockchain platform integration
Research and evaluate emerging blockchain technologies
jobs.future_scope: Growing in fintech, supply chain, and Web3 sectors. Path to Blockchain Architect or Web3 Lead.

jobs.title: Computer & Information Research Scientist
jobs.description: Conducts research into fundamental computer and information science as theorists, designers, or inventors. Develops solutions to problems in the field of computing.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct fundamental and applied research in CS/AI/Systems
Publish research findings in peer-reviewed journals and conferences
Develop new algorithms, data structures, and computing paradigms
Collaborate with industry and academic partners on research programs
Mentor PhD students and junior researchers

preferred: PhD Computer Science / AI / Mathematics from Top Institute
alternative: Top Research Publications without a Full PhD

jobs.future_scope: Critical in R&D labs at ISRO, DRDO, IITs, Google, Meta, and Microsoft Research India.

jobs.title: Health Informatics Specialist
jobs.description: Applies knowledge of healthcare and informatics to assist in the design, development, and modification of computerized healthcare systems such as EHR, CDSS, and telemedicine platforms.
roles_responsibilities: Design and implement electronic health record (EHR) systems
Integrate clinical systems with HL7 / FHIR standards
Analyze healthcare data to improve clinical workflows
Train clinical staff on health IT systems
Ensure HIPAA / DPDP Act compliance for health data
jobs.future_scope: Digital health is transforming India's healthcare sector. Path to Chief Health Information Officer or CISO Healthcare.

jobs.title: Clinical Data Manager
jobs.description: Applies knowledge of health care and database management to analyze clinical data, and to identify and report trends for clinical research and trials.
roles_responsibilities: Design and manage clinical trial databases and EDC systems
Develop and maintain Data Management Plans (DMP)
Perform data cleaning, validation, and query resolution
Ensure data quality and integrity for regulatory submissions
Produce data reports and summaries for clinical study teams

alternative: 2-4 Years in Clinical Research Data Management

jobs.future_scope: India is a growing hub for clinical trials. Path to Senior CDM, Data Manager Lead, or Biostatistician.

jobs.title: Bioinformatics Engineer / Technician
jobs.description: Applies principles and methods of bioinformatics to assist scientists in areas such as pharmaceuticals, medical technology, biotechnology, computational biology, and agriculture.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and maintain bioinformatics pipelines for genomic/proteomic data
Analyze next-generation sequencing (NGS) and omics datasets
Build databases and tools for biological data storage and retrieval
Collaborate with biologists and clinical scientists on data interpretation
Apply machine learning to biological sequence and structure data

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Tech Bioinformatics / B.Sc Biotechnology / B.Sc CS

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand in pharma, agriculture, and genomics startups. Path to Computational Biology Lead or Research Scientist.

jobs.title: API Developer / Integration Engineer
jobs.description: Designs, builds, and maintains APIs and system integrations that connect disparate software systems, platforms, and third-party services into a cohesive digital ecosystem.
roles_responsibilities: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs with versioning and documentation
Build middleware and integration layers between enterprise systems
Manage API gateways, rate limiting, and authentication (OAuth, JWT)
Integrate third-party services (payment gateways, SaaS, ERPs)
Monitor API performance and ensure SLA compliance
jobs.future_scope: Every digital business runs on APIs. Path to Integration Architect or Senior Backend Engineer.

jobs.title: Game Developer
jobs.description: Designs and develops video game software across platforms (PC, console, mobile, VR/AR). Implements game logic, physics, graphics rendering, and multiplayer systems.
roles_responsibilities: Develop game systems, mechanics, and engine integrations
Implement rendering, physics, and animation systems
Optimize game performance for target platforms
Build multiplayer networking and backend game services
Collaborate with designers and artists on feature implementation

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Tech CSE / B.Sc Computer Science / BCA
preferred: B.Tech CSE with Game Dev specialization
alternative: Published Games Portfolio + Game Jam experience

jobs.future_scope: India's gaming industry is growing fast with studios like Nazara, nCore, and MoonFrog. Path to Senior Game Dev or Technical Director.

jobs.title: DevSecOps Engineer
jobs.description: Integrates security practices into the DevOps lifecycle — embedding security testing, vulnerability scanning, and compliance automation directly into CI/CD pipelines.
roles_responsibilities: Integrate SAST, DAST, and SCA tools into CI/CD pipelines
Implement secrets management and container security scanning
Conduct threat modeling and security architecture reviews
Automate compliance checks for SOC2, ISO 27001, and PCI-DSS
Collaborate with developers to remediate security vulnerabilities
jobs.future_scope: One of the fastest growing roles in tech. Path to Security Architect or CISO.

jobs.title: Low-Code / No-Code Developer
jobs.description: Builds enterprise applications using visual development platforms and low-code tools, enabling rapid delivery of business solutions with minimal traditional coding.
roles_responsibilities: Build and configure applications on low-code platforms (OutSystems, Mendix, Power Apps)
Integrate low-code apps with enterprise systems via APIs
Automate business workflows using no-code tools
Train business users on platform usage
Manage application lifecycle, updates, and governance
jobs.future_scope: Growing rapidly as enterprises adopt citizen development strategies. Path to Solution Architect or Enterprise Application Developer.

jobs.title: Generative AI Engineer
jobs.description: Builds production applications powered by generative AI models (LLMs, diffusion models). Specializes in LLM integration, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and AI app deployment.
roles_responsibilities: Design and build LLM-powered applications and agents
Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
Fine-tune and evaluate large language models for domain-specific use cases
Build prompt templates, chains, and AI orchestration workflows
Optimize LLM inference for cost and latency at scale

alternative: Deployed GenAI Applications Portfolio + Strong Python skills

jobs.future_scope: Hottest emerging role of 2024-2026. Path to AI Lead, Head of AI, or AI Startup Founder.

jobs.title: Data Product Manager
jobs.description: Manages the strategy, roadmap, and delivery of data products — including data platforms, analytics tools, ML systems, and data APIs — aligning them with business goals.
roles_responsibilities: Define vision and roadmap for data products and platforms
Gather requirements from data consumers (analysts, scientists, engineers)
Prioritize data product backlog based on business impact
Collaborate with data engineering and ML teams on delivery
Define data product metrics and success criteria

alternative: Product Management Experience + Data Domain Knowledge

jobs.future_scope: Emerging high-value role at the intersection of product and data. Path to Head of Data or VP Product.

jobs.title: AI / ML Product Manager
jobs.description: Manages AI and ML-powered product features and systems — bridging the gap between ML research, engineering, and business stakeholders to deliver intelligent product experiences.
roles_responsibilities: Define product strategy for AI/ML features
Work with data scientists and ML engineers on model requirements
Evaluate model performance in the context of business outcomes
Manage the lifecycle of AI features from prototype to production
Communicate AI capabilities and limitations to business stakeholders
jobs.future_scope: One of the most valuable emerging PM specializations. Path to VP of AI Product or CPO.

jobs.title: Prompt Engineer
jobs.description: Specializes in designing, optimizing, and evaluating prompts and prompt pipelines for large language models (LLMs) to reliably produce high-quality outputs for specific use cases.
roles_responsibilities: Design and test prompt templates for LLM-powered applications
Build and maintain prompt libraries and evaluation frameworks
Conduct systematic prompt experiments and A/B testing
Optimize prompts for accuracy, safety, latency, and cost
Collaborate with ML engineers on fine-tuning vs prompting trade-offs

alternative: Demonstrated LLM Projects + Strong Writing & Analytical Skills

jobs.future_scope: New role born from the LLM revolution. Path to AI Engineer, NLP Engineer, or AI Product Lead.

jobs.title: AI Ethics Officer / Responsible AI Lead
jobs.description: Ensures AI systems are developed and deployed responsibly — addressing fairness, bias, transparency, privacy, and regulatory compliance across the organization's AI portfolio.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and enforce responsible AI frameworks and guidelines
Conduct AI bias audits and fairness assessments
Ensure compliance with AI regulations (EU AI Act, India DPDP Act)
Engage stakeholders on ethical AI practices
Drive AI governance and risk management programs

preferred: Philosophy / Law / Social Science + AI background

jobs.future_scope: Rapidly growing as AI regulation becomes mandatory globally. Path to Chief AI Officer or Chief Ethics Officer.

jobs.title: Chief AI Officer (CAIO)
jobs.description: The top executive responsible for the organization's end-to-end AI strategy, adoption, governance, and capability building — translating AI into business value at the enterprise level.
roles_responsibilities: Define and execute the company's AI strategy and roadmap
Build and lead the AI Center of Excellence (CoE)
Oversee AI governance, ethics, and risk management
Represent AI to the board, investors, and regulators
Drive AI capability building across business functions

educational_qualification.minimum: Master's Degree in CS / AI / Statistics
alternative: Proven VP of AI or Head of AI Track Record

jobs.future_scope: Newest C-suite role emerging across industries. Top of the AI career ladder.

jobs.title: Robotics Engineer
jobs.description: Designs, builds, and programs robotic systems that operate autonomously or semi-autonomously, combining mechanical, electrical, and software engineering with AI and control systems.
roles_responsibilities: Design robotic systems for industrial, medical, or consumer applications
Develop motion planning, path planning, and control algorithms
Integrate computer vision and AI for autonomous decision-making
Program robotic systems using ROS (Robot Operating System)
Test and validate robots in simulation and real-world environments
jobs.future_scope: High demand in manufacturing automation, ISRO, defense, and agritech. Path to Robotics Architect or R&D Lead.

jobs.title: Cloud Security Engineer
jobs.description: Designs and implements security controls specifically for cloud environments — securing cloud workloads, identities, networks, and data across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
roles_responsibilities: Design and enforce cloud security architecture (IAM, VPC, encryption)
Implement Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tools
Manage cloud identity and access management (IAM) policies
Conduct cloud security assessments and penetration tests
Ensure compliance with cloud security standards (CIS Benchmarks, AWS Well-Architected)
jobs.future_scope: Every cloud migration needs cloud security. Path to Principal Security Architect or CISO.

jobs.title: FinOps Engineer / Cloud Cost Analyst
jobs.description: Manages and optimizes cloud spending by analyzing usage patterns, implementing cost governance frameworks, and collaborating with engineering teams to reduce cloud bills while maintaining performance.
roles_responsibilities: Analyze cloud billing and identify cost optimization opportunities
Implement cloud cost governance policies and tagging strategies
Build cost visibility dashboards and chargeback reports
Collaborate with engineering teams on rightsizing and reserved instances
Drive FinOps culture and best practices across the organization
tools_technologies: AWS Cost Explorer / Cost and Usage Reports
jobs.future_scope: Growing rapidly as cloud costs balloon. Path to Head of FinOps or Cloud Architect.

jobs.title: ERP Consultant (SAP / Oracle)
jobs.description: Implements, configures, and optimizes enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems like SAP or Oracle for client organizations across modules such as FICO, MM, SD, HR, and SCM.
roles_responsibilities: Gather business requirements and map them to ERP system configuration
Configure and customize ERP modules (FICO, MM, SD, PP, HR)
Lead ERP implementation and migration projects
Conduct user training and change management
Provide post-go-live support and system optimization

alternative: ERP Implementation Project Experience + Module Certifications

jobs.future_scope: India is a global SAP consulting hub. Path to SAP Solution Architect or ERP Program Manager.

jobs.title: SAP ABAP Developer
jobs.description: Develops custom programs, reports, enhancements, and interfaces within SAP systems using the ABAP programming language. Builds SAP Fiori apps and SAP BTP extensions.
roles_responsibilities: Develop custom ABAP programs, function modules, and BAPIs
Build SAP Fiori and UI5 web applications
Create and maintain SAP interfaces (IDocs, RFC, web services)
Perform code reviews and optimize ABAP program performance
Support SAP upgrades and migration to SAP S/4HANA
jobs.future_scope: Strong demand from SAP S/4HANA migrations. Path to SAP Technical Architect or SAP Solution Architect.

jobs.title: Salesforce Developer / Administrator
jobs.description: Builds, configures, and customizes Salesforce CRM solutions to automate sales, marketing, and service processes for organizations.
roles_responsibilities: Configure Salesforce objects, workflows, flows, and validation rules
Develop Apex classes, triggers, and Lightning Web Components (LWC)
Integrate Salesforce with external systems via REST/SOAP APIs
Manage user roles, profiles, and security settings
Perform data migrations and maintain Salesforce data quality
jobs.future_scope: Salesforce is widely adopted in India. Path to Salesforce Architect or CRM Lead.

jobs.title: ERP Business Analyst
jobs.description: Bridges the gap between business stakeholders and ERP implementation teams — translating operational requirements into ERP configuration specifications and ensuring successful system adoption.
roles_responsibilities: Gather and document business requirements for ERP modules
Map business processes to ERP system capabilities and gaps
Conduct fit-gap analysis and recommend solutions
Coordinate UAT and support change management activities
Create functional specifications and training materials

alternative: Business Analysis Certifications + ERP Project Experience

jobs.future_scope: ERP modernization is ongoing across India's large enterprises. Path to ERP Functional Lead or SAP Consultant.

jobs.title: IT Auditor
jobs.description: Examines and evaluates IT systems, controls, and processes to ensure accuracy, security, and compliance with regulatory and internal standards.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct IT audits of applications, infrastructure, and IT processes
Assess IT general controls (ITGC) and application controls
Evaluate compliance with standards (ISO 27001, SOC 2, COBIT, GDPR)
Identify control weaknesses and recommend remediation
Prepare audit reports for management and external auditors
jobs.future_scope: Mandatory in BFSI, Big 4 consulting, and listed companies. Path to Senior IT Auditor or CISO.

jobs.title: Data Privacy Officer (DPO)
jobs.description: Ensures the organization processes personal data in compliance with data protection laws such as India's DPDP Act, GDPR, and other applicable privacy regulations.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and maintain data privacy policies and frameworks
Conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs)
Act as point of contact for data subjects and regulatory authorities
Monitor compliance with DPDP Act, GDPR, and sector-specific regulations
Train staff on data privacy obligations and best practices

alternative: Legal or Compliance Background + Privacy Certifications

jobs.future_scope: India's DPDP Act 2023 is making DPOs mandatory across industries. Path to Chief Privacy Officer.

jobs.title: GRC Analyst (Governance, Risk & Compliance)
jobs.description: Supports the governance, risk, and compliance function by identifying IT risks, maintaining control frameworks, and ensuring adherence to regulatory and policy requirements.
roles_responsibilities: Maintain the GRC framework and risk register
Conduct risk assessments and control effectiveness reviews
Track remediation of audit findings and compliance gaps
Prepare compliance reports for regulatory submissions
Support ISO 27001, SOC 2, and other certification audits

alternative: IT Audit or Legal Background + GRC Certifications

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand across BFSI, tech, and healthcare. Path to GRC Manager or Chief Risk Officer.

jobs.title: Pre-Sales / Solutions Engineer
jobs.description: Acts as the technical bridge between the sales team and prospective clients — demonstrating product capabilities, designing solutions, answering technical questions, and creating winning proposals.
roles_responsibilities: Lead technical demonstrations and proof-of-concept (PoC) engagements
Design solution architectures tailored to client needs
Respond to RFPs/RFIs with technical proposals
Build trusted relationships with client technical stakeholders
Support sales teams in deal qualification and closing

alternative: Technical Background + Proven Customer Engagement Skills

jobs.future_scope: High-demand in SaaS, cloud, and enterprise software companies. Path to Solutions Architect or Sales Director.

jobs.title: Technical Account Manager (TAM)
jobs.description: Manages post-sales technical relationships with key enterprise clients — ensuring successful product adoption, resolving technical issues, and identifying upsell and expansion opportunities.
roles_responsibilities: Serve as primary technical point of contact for enterprise clients
Drive product adoption and ensure customer success
Identify and resolve technical blockers and escalations
Conduct regular business reviews with customer leadership
Identify opportunities for upsell and product expansion
jobs.future_scope: In demand at SaaS, cloud, and enterprise tech companies. Path to Customer Success Director or Solutions Architect.

jobs.title: IT Sales Executive / Technology Sales Consultant
jobs.description: Sources and closes new IT product and services deals — managing the full sales cycle from prospecting and qualification through negotiation and closure.
roles_responsibilities: Prospect and qualify new enterprise and SMB clients
Understand client IT needs and recommend appropriate solutions
Manage the full sales cycle from first call to contract closure
Negotiate pricing, contracts, and service terms
Collaborate with pre-sales, implementation, and support teams

alternative: Strong Sales Track Record in IT / Tech Domain

jobs.future_scope: Growing IT services market in India. Path to Regional Sales Manager or VP Sales.

jobs.title: Threat Intelligence Analyst
jobs.description: Collects, analyzes, and disseminates cyber threat intelligence to help organizations understand adversary tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs) and proactively defend against attacks.
roles_responsibilities: Collect threat intelligence from OSINT, dark web, and threat feeds
Analyze adversary TTPs using MITRE ATT&CK framework
Produce threat intelligence reports for security and leadership teams
Correlate threat data with organizational exposure and assets
Support incident response with threat context and attribution

alternative: SOC Analyst Experience + Threat Intel Certifications

jobs.future_scope: Critical in BFSI, defense, and large enterprises. Path to Cyber Threat Intelligence Lead or CISO.

jobs.title: SOC Analyst (Security Operations Center)
jobs.description: Monitors, detects, investigates, and responds to cybersecurity events and incidents in real-time from a Security Operations Center, working across L1 / L2 / L3 tiers.
roles_responsibilities: Monitor SIEM dashboards and security alerts (L1/L2/L3)
Triage and investigate security incidents and anomalies
Perform initial containment and escalation of confirmed incidents
Document incident details and maintain case management records
Tune SIEM rules and reduce false positives
jobs.future_scope: Entry point into cybersecurity. Path to Senior SOC Analyst, Threat Hunter, or Incident Response Lead.

jobs.title: Application Security (AppSec) Engineer
jobs.description: Secures software applications throughout the SDLC — embedding security reviews, automated scanning, and developer security training into the development process.
roles_responsibilities: Perform secure code reviews and security architecture assessments
Integrate SAST and DAST tools into CI/CD pipelines
Conduct web application penetration tests (OWASP Top 10)
Train development teams on secure coding practices
Manage vulnerability disclosure and bug bounty programs

alternative: Development Experience + Security Certifications + Bug Bounty Track Record

jobs.future_scope: High demand as every company ships software. Path to AppSec Lead or Security Architect.

jobs.title: UX Researcher
jobs.description: Conducts qualitative and quantitative research to understand user behavior, needs, and pain points — informing design and product decisions with user evidence.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability tests
Perform contextual inquiry, diary studies, and field research
Analyze qualitative data and synthesize findings into insights
Create research artifacts: personas, journey maps, and research reports
Advocate for user needs in product and design decisions

alternative: Google UX Certificate + Strong Research Portfolio

jobs.future_scope: Growing as product companies adopt research-driven design. Path to Lead UX Researcher or Head of Design.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Takes end-to-end ownership of the design of digital products — combining UX research, information architecture, interaction design, and visual design to create user-centered products.
roles_responsibilities: Own end-to-end design of product features from research to production
Conduct user research and usability testing
Create information architecture, flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity prototypes
Maintain and evolve the product design system
Collaborate with PMs and engineers throughout the product lifecycle

jobs.title: Web / SEO Developer
jobs.description: Builds and maintains websites with a dual focus on technical implementation and search engine optimization — combining web development skills with SEO strategy.
roles_responsibilities: Build and optimize websites for performance and SEO
Implement on-page SEO (metadata, schema, URL structure, Core Web Vitals)
Develop technical SEO solutions (site architecture, crawlability, indexing)
Integrate analytics and tag management tools
Collaborate with content teams on keyword strategy and landing page design

jobs.future_scope: High demand in digital agencies, D2C brands, and media companies. Path to SEO Manager or Digital Marketing Lead.

jobs.title: Wireless Network Engineer
jobs.description: Designs, implements, and optimizes wireless network infrastructure including Wi-Fi, 4G/5G, and enterprise wireless LAN solutions.
roles_responsibilities: Design and deploy enterprise Wi-Fi and wireless LAN infrastructure
Plan and optimize 5G / LTE network coverage and capacity
Perform RF site surveys and signal analysis
Troubleshoot wireless performance issues and interference
Manage wireless controllers and cloud-managed access points

jobs.title: IT Infrastructure Engineer
jobs.description: Designs, builds, and maintains the foundational IT infrastructure — servers, storage, networks, virtualization, and data center systems — that supports all business operations.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and manage on-premise and hybrid IT infrastructure
Administer virtualization platforms (VMware, Hyper-V)
Manage SAN / NAS storage and backup systems
Handle hardware provisioning, patching, and lifecycle management
Plan and execute infrastructure migration and modernization projects
jobs.future_scope: Stable demand in large enterprises and data centers. Path to Infrastructure Architect or Cloud Engineer.

jobs.title: IoT Engineer
jobs.description: Designs and develops Internet of Things (IoT) solutions — connecting physical devices to the cloud through sensors, firmware, communication protocols, and cloud data platforms.
roles_responsibilities: Design IoT system architecture (device, connectivity, cloud)
Develop firmware for IoT devices and microcontrollers
Implement IoT communication protocols (MQTT, CoAP, Zigbee, LoRaWAN)
Build cloud data pipelines for IoT telemetry processing

tools_technologies: AWS IoT Core / Azure IoT Hub
jobs.future_scope: IoT is transforming manufacturing, agriculture, and smart cities in India. Path to IoT Architect or Product Lead.

jobs.title: AR/VR Developer
jobs.description: Builds augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) applications and experiences for gaming, training, healthcare, retail, and industrial use cases.
roles_responsibilities: Develop immersive AR/VR experiences using Unity or Unreal Engine
Implement 3D rendering, spatial audio, and physics simulations
Integrate AR frameworks (ARKit, ARCore, Vuforia) for mobile AR
Optimize XR applications for performance on target hardware
Collaborate with 3D artists and UX designers on immersive experiences

preferred: B.Tech CSE with Game Dev / XR experience
alternative: Strong XR Portfolio + Published AR/VR Applications

jobs.future_scope: Growing in gaming, training, retail, and industrial use. Path to XR Lead or Technical Director.

jobs.title: Quantum Computing Researcher
jobs.description: Researches and develops algorithms, software, and systems for quantum computers — exploring quantum supremacy, error correction, and practical quantum applications.
roles_responsibilities: Develop quantum algorithms for optimization, cryptography, and simulation
Implement quantum circuits using Qiskit, Cirq, or Braket
Research quantum error correction and fault-tolerant computing
Collaborate with physicists, mathematicians, and engineers
Publish research findings in quantum computing journals and conferences

educational_qualification.minimum: M.Tech / M.Sc in Physics / CS / Mathematics
preferred: PhD in Quantum Computing / Quantum Physics / CS
alternative: Top Quantum Computing Research Publications without Full PhD

jobs.future_scope: Pre-commercial but rapidly growing. High demand from IBM, Google, IISc, DRDO, and TCS Research.

jobs.title: GIS Specialist / Geospatial Developer
jobs.description: Uses geographic information systems, spatial data, and geospatial programming to build maps, location intelligence tools, and spatial analysis systems.
roles_responsibilities: Develop GIS applications and geospatial data pipelines
Perform spatial analysis and map visualization
Manage geospatial databases and spatial data formats
Build location-based APIs and map integrations
Support urban planning, logistics, and environmental monitoring use cases
jobs.future_scope: High demand in urban planning, defense, agriculture, and logistics. Path to GIS Architect or Geospatial Lead.

jobs.title: Document Management Specialist
jobs.description: Implements and administers enterprise document management systems (DMS) that allow organizations to capture, store, retrieve, share, and manage information throughout its lifecycle.
roles_responsibilities: Implement and configure enterprise DMS and ECM platforms
Define document taxonomy, metadata, and retention policies
Migrate legacy documents to new DMS platforms
Train users on document management processes

alternative: ECM / DMS Project Experience + AIIM Certifications

jobs.future_scope: Demand driven by digital transformation and compliance mandates. Path to Information Manager or Solutions Architect.
